good.description: Plausible near-tempo taps with small deterministic jitter.
good.workflow_interpretation: Simulated tapping validates workflow and analysis code only, not human rhythm perception.

too-few-taps.description: Only two calibration taps, below the minimum-tap threshold.
too-few-taps.workflow_interpretation: Simulated tapping validates workflow and analysis code only, not human rhythm perception.

off-tempo.description: Stable taps at 135% of the target inter-beat interval.
off-tempo.workflow_interpretation: Simulated tapping validates workflow and analysis code only, not human rhythm perception.

noisy.description: Enough taps but high timing variability.
noisy.workflow_interpretation: Simulated tapping validates workflow and analysis code only, not human rhythm perception.

dropout.description: No calibration taps, explicitly marked as dropout_no_taps.
dropout.workflow_interpretation: Simulated tapping validates workflow and analysis code only, not human rhythm perception.
